mapper.sql: id, parent_id, dept_name, org_type, dept_code, address, leader, phone, email, remark, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted
d.id, d.parent_id, d.dept_name, d.org_type, d.dept_code, d.address, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.remark, d.status, d.sort_order, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT FROM sys_department d INNER JOIN sys_role_dept rd ON d.id = rd.dept_id WHERE rd.role_id = #{roleId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department ( parent_id, dept_name, org_type, dept_code, address, leader, phone, email, remark, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{orgType}, #{deptCode}, #{address}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_department SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
